'''tadhana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobesilate|dobesilate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobesilate|dobesilate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadhana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhænæth|tædhænæth]] || [[word:tædhænæj|tædhænæj]] || [[word:tædhænæsh|tædhænæsh]] || [[word:tædhænæ|tædhænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhadhanath|tadhadhanath]] || [[word:tadhadhanaj|tadhadhanaj]] || [[word:tadhadhanash|tadhadhanash]] || [[word:tadhadhana|tadhadhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhanath|tadhanath]] || [[word:tadhanaj|tadhanaj]] || [[word:tadhanash|tadhanash]] || [[word:tadhana|tadhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhafnafth|tadhafnafth]] || [[word:tadhafnafj|tadhafnafj]] || [[word:tadhafnafsh|tadhafnafsh]] || [[word:tadhafnaf|tadhafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhanatha|tadhanatha]] || [[word:tadhanaja|tadhanaja]] || [[word:tadhanasha|tadhanasha]] || [[word:tadhanaka|tadhanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhanath|tadhanath]] || [[word:tadhanaj|tadhanaj]] || [[word:tadhanash|tadhanash]] || [[word:tadhana|tadhana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhanathal|tadhanathal]] || [[word:tadhanajal|tadhanajal]] || [[word:tadhanashal|tadhanashal]] || [[word:tadhanakal|tadhanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhanaathatha|tadhanaathatha]] || [[word:tadhanaajaja|tadhanaajaja]] || [[word:tadhanaashasha|tadhanaashasha]] || [[word:tadhanaaka|tadhanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhanathan|tadhanathan]] || [[word:tadhanajan|tadhanajan]] || [[word:tadhanashan|tadhanashan]] || [[word:tadhanakan|tadhanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhanathaoro|tadhanathaoro]] || [[word:tadhanajaoro|tadhanajaoro]] || [[word:tadhanashaoro|tadhanashaoro]] || [[word:tadhanakaoro|tadhanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
